prompt: The panel shows graphical artifacts from previous frames — old shapes are not erased. What is the bug?
choices: fillOval cannot be called without first calling setStroke()
super.paintComponent(g) is not called — it clears the background before each paint; without it, previous drawings accumulate as artifacts
x must be declared volatile for repaint() to pick up the new value
paintComponent must call repaint() at the end to schedule the next frame
explanation: super.paintComponent(g) fills the panel with the background color, effectively erasing everything before you draw the new frame. Skipping it means old drawings remain on screen, leaving a trail of overlapping ovals. Always call super.paintComponent(g) as the very first line of paintComponent.
